description: ChMac, a quick Windows batch CLI utility to change or randomize network adapter MAC address for security, or to work around usage limit of public Wi-Fi hotspots, either automatically or manually. The command, chmac.bat, changes MAC addresses in an easy-to-use interactive console alongside command-line parameters
notes: 【主要功能】: MAC地址修改工具，支持自动或手动修改网络适配器MAC地址
【适用场景】: 网络安全、绕过公共WiFi限制、MAC地址伪装
【技术特点】: 批处理脚本，支持交互式和命令行模式
